headline: JPMorgan Chase Initiative Links Community Lending Push With Valuation Debate
summary: JPMorgan Chase, NYSE:JPM, has launched the American Dream Initiative, a multi year program aimed at expanding economic opportunity. The plan includes more than 160 new branches plus targeted lending for small businesses and low to moderate income communities. The initiative focuses on lending, branch expansion, and community development to support underserved areas across the US. JPMorgan Chase enters this new phase of community investment with its shares trading at $309.87. The stock has...

headline: China’s Victory Giant Seeks Up to $2.2 Billion in Hong Kong Listing
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Victory Giant Technology Huizhou Co. began taking investor orders for a listing in Hong Kong that may raise as much as HK$17.5 billion ($2.2 billion) in what is set to be among the city’s largest first-time share sales this year. The maker of printed circuit board products — the intricate electronic backbone of artificial-intelligence servers — is offering 83.3 million shares at as much as HK$209.88 each, according to a listing document released on Monday. headline: Had You Invested $1,000 in Goldman Sachs 10 Years Ago, Here’s What You’d Have Now
summary: Goldman Sachs (NYSE: GS) reported Q1 2026 EPS of $17.55 versus a FactSet estimate of $16.47, with revenue of $17.23 billion, up 14%, against a $16.99 billion estimate. Net earnings rose 18% to $5.63 billion, EPS climbed 24%, equity trading revenue rose 27%, and investment banking fees rose 48%. Yet the stock fell approximately 4% ... Had You Invested $1,000 in Goldman Sachs 10 Years Ago, Here’s What You’d Have Now

headline: How The Alimentation Couche Tard (TSX:ATD) Narrative Is Evolving With Mixed Analyst Targets
summary: The latest update on Alimentation Couche-Tard trims the modelled fair value only slightly, from CA$91.96 to CA$91.66, keeping the price target effectively in the same ballpark. That small shift lines up with a research backdrop where some firms are lifting targets, others are trimming by a few dollars, and at least one large bank is starting coverage on a more neutral footing. Read on to see what is driving these different viewpoints and how you can track the evolving analyst story around the...
